metadata.positioning: BFCL/APIBench-style local artifact with executable Python tools; not an official BFCL, ToolBench, APIBench, or AgentBench score.

tools.description: Convert between temperature, distance, and mass units.
tools.name: unit_convert

tools.description: Compute absolute day distance between ISO dates.
tools.name: date_diff

tools.description: Count characters, words, and unique words in text.
tools.name: text_stats

tools.description: Read a dot-path value from a JSON-like object.
tools.name: json_lookup

tools.description: Rank support tickets by priority and age.
tools.name: ticket_ranker

contextual_efe_discounted_we_0.45.prompt: Read metrics.latency.p95 from the service JSON.
Read user.plan.tier from the JSON profile.
Count words and unique words in: tool learning needs real calls.
Compute the day gap from 2026-01-01 to 2026-06-15.
Order tickets, breaking ties by older age first.
How many days are between 2026-06-15 and 2026-08-29?

arguments.text: route tools, learn tools, verify tools

contextual_efe_discounted_we_0.45.prompt: Analyze word counts for: route tools, learn tools, verify tools.

arguments.text: route tools, learn tools, verify tools

contextual_efe_discounted_we_0.45.prompt: Rank these support tickets by urgency.
Find 15 percent of 240 for a discount calculation.
Count text statistics for: exact traces make routing auditable.
